step_rationale: Glucose metabolism remodelling; post-MI cardiac dysfunction.
mechanism: Citrate-synthase expression regulates oxidative metabolism and mitochondrial-ATP synthesis during post-MI cardiac remodelling.

references.title: Beneficial effects of aryl hydrocarbon receptor activation on post-infarction myocardial metabolism, inflammation and fibrosis: implications from multi-omics.
references.journal: Journal of molecular and cellular cardiology
